message:
chore(beads): close bd-12vyy with benchmark completion summary

Close bd-12vyy (Spork baseline benchmarks) assigned to OrangeDune:
- 13 Criterion benchmarks in benches/spork_baseline.rs
- GenServer: call ~45μs, cast x10 ~40μs, spawn ~37μs
- Registry: register ~195ns, whereis hit/miss ~10ns/4ns
- Supervisor: restart plans 102-365ns, compile_10 ~3.9μs
- Harness: empty app lifecycle ~48μs
- All deterministic with fixed seed for reproducibility

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
